entries.reason: The Luna pr_split_scope review inspected the full current diff: Story/Spec, resolver and propagation paths, generated CLI documentation, gate metadata, and tests are coupled parts of one authority contract. The 32-commit warning comes from branch history after rebasing, while the actual 30-file surface is one Story and splitting would weaken end-to-end traceability.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
